context: Evaluates the agent's ability to correctly supersede an existing ADR: update status to superseded on the old ADR, add superseded_by, create a new ADR with higher number, and regenerate the index.

checklist.name: Old ADR updated
checklist.description: Old ADR status set to superseded with superseded_by field

checklist.name: New ADR created
checklist.description: New ADR created with incremented number and proper frontmatter

checklist.name: Immutability respected
checklist.description: Old ADR body not edited — only status/superseded_by changed
